# Guarantee Conditions

Confidence rises when these conditions are true.

## Strong-confidence threshold

Do not use high-confidence language until at least four are true:

1. public demand evidence,
2. competitor spend/category evidence,
3. proof asset exists,
4. first-value path is short,
5. tracking is stable,
6. early inspection signal exists,
7. offer has risk reversal.

The more conditions are true, the closer the system gets to practical reliability.
